Description

Core classes of the framework.

VSAM emulation API for Oracle

com.nib.utilities.api.le
LE (Language Environement) utilities.
  • Classes in com.nib.commons used by com.nib.commons
    Class
    Description
    AbstractProgram
    NIB Abstract program Every program running as a such (so CALLed, CANCELed, etc.) in the NIB framework must extend this class
    Configuration
     
    Configuration.VsamConfig
    Database connection defaults
    Context
     
    Context.IProcedureDelegate
     
    IEnvironment
    The IEnvironment interface provides a generic environment for N.I.B.
    ProceduralFlowManager
    Experimental COBOL like procedural flow manager
    ProceduralFlowManager.ProcessDelegate
    Delegate functional interface
